title: Kubelet Configuration (v1alpha1) — ImagePullIntent
text:
ImagePullIntent is a record of the kubelet attempting to pull an image.
Field
Description
apiVersion
string
kubelet.config.k8s.io/v1alpha1
kind
string
ImagePullIntent
image
[Required]
string
Image is the image spec from a Container's
image
field.
The filename is a SHA-256 hash of this value. This is to avoid filename-unsafe
characters like ':' and '/'.
